sentences.target: Ich nehme die Tablette nach dem Essen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈneːmə diː taˈblɛtə naːx deːm ˈʔɛsn̩/

translations.de: Ich nehme die Tablette nach dem Essen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈneːmə diː taˈblɛtə naːx deːm ˈʔɛsn̩/
translations.en: I take the pill after eating.
translations.es: Tomo la pastilla después de comer.
translations.fr: Je prends le comprimé après le repas.
translations.it: Prendo la pillola dopo aver mangiato.
translations.pt: Tomo o comprimido depois de comer.
translations.he: אני לוקח את הכדור אחרי האוכל.
translations.vi: Tôi uống thuốc sau khi ăn.
translations.nl: Ik neem de tablet na het eten.
translations.hu: A tablettát étkezés után veszem be.
translations.hi: मैं खाना खाने के बाद गोली लेता हूँ.
translations.el: Παίρνω το χάπι μετά το φαγητό.
translations.ja: 食後に錠剤を飲みます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; governs direct object 'die Tablette' and temporal PP 'nach dem Essen'.
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner agreeing with 'Tablette' as direct object.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'nehme'.
Preposition that selects dative; introduces temporal prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative singular neuter (required by 'nach'); determiner for 'Essen'.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular; object of the preposition 'nach' forming a temporal adjunct.

sentences.target: Die Tablette liegt auf dem Küchentisch.

translations.de: Die Tablette liegt auf dem Küchentisch.
translations.en: The pill is lying on the kitchen table.
translations.es: La pastilla está sobre la mesa de la cocina.
translations.fr: Le comprimé est sur la table de la cuisine.
translations.it: La pillola è sul tavolo della cucina.
translations.pt: O comprimido está em cima da mesa da cozinha.
translations.vi: Viên thuốc nằm trên bàn bếp.
translations.nl: De tablet ligt op de keukentafel.
translations.hi: गोली रसोई की मेज पर रखी है.
translations.el: Το χάπι είναι πάνω στο τραπέζι της κουζίνας.
translations.id: Pil itu ada di atas meja dapur.
translations.ro: Pastila este pe masa din bucătărie.
translations.ja: 錠剤がキッチンのテーブルの上にある。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determiner for the subject 'Tablette'.
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; grammatical subject of 'liegt'.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; describes location; takes PP 'auf dem Küchentisch'.
Two-way preposition; here used with dative to express static location.
Definite article, dative singular masculine; determiner for 'Küchentisch' after 'auf' (location).
Compound common noun (Küche+Tisch), masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'auf'.

sentences.target: Sie vergisst ihre Tablette jeden Morgen.

translations.de: Sie vergisst ihre Tablette jeden Morgen.
translations.en: She forgets her pill every morning.
translations.es: Se olvida de su pastilla todas las mañanas.
translations.fr: Elle oublie son comprimé chaque matin.
translations.it: Ogni mattina si dimentica di prendere la pillola.
translations.ko: 그녀는 매일 아침 약 먹는 것을 잊어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她每天早上都会忘记吃药。
translations.yue: 佢每日朝早都會唔記得食藥。
translations.ru: Она каждое утро забывает принять таблетку.
translations.pt: Ela esquece de tomar o comprimido todas as manhãs.
translations.he: היא שוכחת את הכדור בכל בוקר.
translations.vi: Cô ấy quên uống thuốc mỗi sáng.
translations.nl: Ze vergeet att ta sin tablett varje morgon.
translations.hu: Minden reggel elfelejti bevenni a tablettáját.
translations.hi: वह हर सुबह अपनी गोली लेना भूल जाती है.
translations.el: Κάθε πρωί ξεχνάει το χάπι της.
translations.nb: Hun glemmer å ta tabletten sin hver morgen.
translations.id: Dia lupa minum obat setiap pagi.
translations.sv: Hon glömmer att ta sin tablett varje morgon.
translations.ro: Uită să-și ia pastila în fiecare dimineață.
translations.cs: Každé ráno zapomíná vzít si tabletu.
translations.da: Hun glemmer at tage sin pille hver morgen.
translations.fi: Hän unohtaa ottaa pillerinsä joka aamu.
translations.ja: 彼女は毎朝薬を飲み忘れます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, typically 3rd person singular feminine nominative; subject of 'vergisst' (also ambiguous with formal 'you').
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; governs direct object 'ihre Tablette' and temporal adverbial 'jeden Morgen'.
Possessive determiner, accusative singular feminine; agrees with 'Tablette' as direct object.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'vergisst'.
Quantifying determiner, accusative singular masculine; modifies 'Morgen' in a temporal adverbial.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; head of the temporal adverbial phrase 'jeden Morgen'.

translations.en: We don't have a pill left.
translations.es: Ya no nos queda ninguna pastilla.
translations.fr: Il ne nous reste plus aucun comprimé.
translations.it: Non ci è rimasta nessuna pillola.
translations.ru: У нас не осталось ни одной таблетки.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi không còn viên thuốc nào.
translations.uk: У нас не залишилося жодної таблетки.
translations.hi: हमारे पास एक भी गोली नहीं बची है.
translations.pl: Nie zostało nam ani jednej tabletki.
translations.el: Δεν μας έμεινε ούτε ένα χάπι.
translations.nb: Vi har ikke flere tabletter igjen.
translations.ro: Nu ne-a mai rămas nicio pastilă.
translations.da: Vi har ikke flere piller tilbage.
translations.fi: Meillä ei ole yhtään tablettia jäljellä.
translations.ja: もう錠剤が一つも残っていません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person plural; lexical 'have' (not auxiliary here).
Negative determiner, accusative singular feminine; negates the direct object noun 'Tablette'.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'haben'.
Adverb meaning 'anymore/any longer'; scopes over the clause to indicate absence remaining.
